risk_factors: Litigation reserve build for legacy mortgage origination
Concentration in commercial real estate lending
Regulatory scrutiny on overdraft and NSF fees
company.ai_summary: American Express Company sits in the Moderate risk band. Revenue trajectory is modest positive, complaint volume is in line with sector medians (21/qtr normalized), and 8-K activity is unremarkable. We see no near-term catalyst that changes the constructive view.
